heading: Overview
body:
Atlas Data Federation is MongoDB's solution for querying data stored in low cost S3 (Simple Storage Service)
buckets, Atlas clusters, HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) stores, and Atlas
Online Archives, using the MongoDB Query Language. This allows
applications to store data in the appropriate storage solution for its
use-case.

This tutorial guides you through the process of creating and connecting
to a sample federated database instance in Atlas, configuring paths to collections for
files stored in S3, and running MongoDB Query Language (MQL) operations.

![Screenshot of the federated database instance after running queries.](/data-federation/images/data-federation/getting-started.png)
